Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-AE Assign Reviewers after the execution of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-AE Assign Reviewers following SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-EIC Reject in variants ending with rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that proceed to editorial decision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time until SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is performed after SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment when followed by reviewer invitation reminders
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Reviewer Agreed across all process variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that include SW-Reviewer Declined or SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined occurs

Name: Average time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in complex revision cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum waiting time to SW-AE Assign Reviewers after SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in high-frequency variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-EIC Major Revision in multi-round revision variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants that loop back to submission after revision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
